session.assistant:
## Summary: make fast-ci passed
All checks in the fast-ci target completed successfully:
- **Lint**: All checks passed - **Format Check**: 1689 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style - **Markdown Check**: Passed - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5978 passed, 2 warnings in 13.97s - **Unit Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 5.60s - **Unit Tests (erk-statusline)**: 115 passed in 0.76s - **Unit Tests (erk-mcp)**: 31 passed - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Verification**: All files properly paired, 0 violations
The 2 warnings are deprecation warnings about BaseCommand in Click 9.0, not errors.
